rationale.equality_proof: Trivial induction. Init sets both ob_authority_ts and ob_primary to 1. OBViewChange increments both by 1 in the same action. No other action touches either. Equality holds in all reachable states.
rationale.property_surface: Zero. ob_authority_ts appears only in TypeInvariant (P1) as a type constraint, which the diff correctly removes. No invariant or liveness property reads ob_authority_ts as a semantic constraint. Confirmed across P1-P19.
rationale.downstream_impact: VC message ts field changes from new_ts to new_session. Semantically identical by the equality proof. DownstreamOMSReceiveOBViewChange monotonicity guard (vc.ts > oms_cached_ob_ts) is preserved.
rationale.diff_correctness: All 11 change sites are mechanically correct: variable declaration, obVars tuple, TypeInvariant, Init, four UNCHANGED clauses, OBViewChange LET binding, OBViewChange body assignment, VC message ts field.

asymmetry_note: ce_authority_ts is not eligible for the same elimination. It appears in P6 (PhantomLeaderRejection, line 893) and P17 (DownstreamCacheCoherence, lines 971-972) as semantic constraints. Eliminating it would require property rewrites, which is out of scope for a pure redundancy elimination. The proposer correctly identified this asymmetry.
disposition: Apply diff as specified. No modifications required.
